name: Indomitable Gladiator Beast
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣闘獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>グラディアルビースト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>底</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そこ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>力</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぢから</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target face-up "Gladiator Beast" monster you control gains 500 ATK until the End Phase. While this card is in your Graveyard, you can return 2 "Gladiator Beast" cards from your Graveyard to the Deck to return this card to your hand.
eff: Target face-up "Gladiator Beast" monster you control gains 500 ATK until the End Phase. While this card is in your Graveyard, you can return 2 "Gladiator Beast" cards from your Graveyard to the Deck to return this card to your hand.

action: Returns from Graveyard to Deck for cost
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
